error_signature: only the first row gets updated
title: Only the first child row is updated in Google Sheets
symptom: When updating multiple rows in Google Sheets, only the first child row receives the updated value, while others are skipped.
applies_when: Updating multiple rows with parent-child relationships
root_cause: The update logic is likely using a non-unique key for matching rows, causing only the first matching row to be updated. This happens when the workflow does not correctly iterate through all child rows for a given parent.
fix_steps: Add a 'Split In Batches' node before the update step with batchSize set to 1
Ensure the Update node references fresh data using $json instead of previously referenced data
agent_instruction: Implement a 'Split In Batches' node with batchSize: 1 before the update step to ensure all matching rows are updated.
